description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to audit broken fragment identifiers (bookmarks/anchors). By default, the spider ignores URL fragments (everything after '#'). You must: 1) Go to Configuration > Spider > Advanced and enable 'Crawl Fragment Identifiers'. 2) Crawl 'https://crawler-test.com/'. 3) After the crawl finishes, find the broken bookmarks (often under the 'Issues' tab > 'Broken Bookmark' or via the 'URL' tab). 4) Export the broken bookmark data to a CSV file in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. The exported CSV must contain the full URLs with their fragments (e.g., '.../page#section').
